scripts.benchmark:recursive-closure: yarn workspace @datalog/ast build && yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && tsc -b ./tsconfig.lib.json && node ./dist/benchmarks/run-recursive-closure-benchmark.js
scripts.benchmark:recursive-closure:validate: yarn workspace @datalog/ast build && yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && tsc -b ./tsconfig.lib.json && node ./dist/benchmarks/run-recursive-closure-benchmark.js --validate
scripts.build: yarn workspace @datalog/ast build && yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && tsc -b ./tsconfig.lib.json
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @datalog/ast build && yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && tsc -p ./tsconfig.lib.json --noEmit && tsc -p ./tsconfig.spec.json --noEmit
scripts.test: yarn workspace @datalog/ast build && yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && vitest run --config ./vitest.config.ts
